instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect overload conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect overload when Transmission_Torque exceeds Torque_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Torque > Torque_Limit THEN Overload_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall reduce engine torque during overload.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall request torque reduction when Transmission_Torque exceeds Torque_Limit.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent shifting during overload.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit shift commands when Overload_Fault equals TRUE.

L4_requirements: IF Overload_Fault = TRUE AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect persistent overload.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when overload persists longer than Overload_Time_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Torque > Torque_Limit AND Overload_Duration > Overload_Time_Limit THEN Overload_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall monitor input shaft torque for overload detection.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect overload when Input_Shaft_Torque exceeds Torque_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Input_Shaft_Torque > Torque_Limit THEN Overload_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent clutch damage during overload.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall increase clutch pressure when overload condition occurs.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall isolate overload fault sources.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall identify fault source when Overload_Fault equals TRUE.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain safe gear during overload.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall maintain predefined gear when Overload_Fault equals TRUE.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall limit vehicle acceleration during overload.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall limit torque when overload condition occurs.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall clear overload faults after load reduction.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall clear overload fault when Transmission_Torque returns below Torque_Limit.
